summary: Frontend retest (backend skipped per request). Verified ProtectedRoute fix for /pending-approval no-op redirect and full UX flows for admin, demo, and pending users. All critical paths PASS.
passed: Pending user login (pendente@yourstatistics.com) lands on /pending-approval and renders pending-card (BUG FROM ITER_2 FIXED)
pending-logout visible and returns user to /login
Demo user attempting /master is redirected to /app/dashboard
tx-add-btn -> modal -> tx-description/tx-amount/tx-type-receita/tx-submit creates a revenue row visible in list (Teste E2E)
action_items: Cosmetic (non-blocker): MasterPanel KPI data-testids are dynamically generated as 'master-kpi-total-de-usuários' (label-based), not 'master-kpi-total/pendente/aprovado/suspenso' as PRD expected. Consider stable slugs (total/pendente/aprovado/suspenso) for easier automation. Values still render correctly and the counters behave properly after approve/suspend actions.

notes.bug_iter2_pending_approval_blank: FIXED — ProtectedRoute now correctly renders <PendingApproval/> when path is already /pending-approval (verified via both login and expected flow). No redirect-to-self loop observed.
